name: Chicken Chalupas (Enchiladus)
recipeIngredient: 2 large Chicken breasts, cooked and cut into small pieces
8 oz Can diced green chilies (I used mild)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soup, onion, green onion tops, sour cream, chilies, and black olives in a bowl.
2. Add most of the cheeses to the mixture, reserving some for topping.
3. Set aside 1 cup of this mixture without the chicken.
4. Add the cut-up chicken to the remaining mixture.
5. Grease a 9 x 13 baking dish.
6. Fill each tortilla with some of the chicken mixture and roll up, folding ends in if desired.
7. Pour the remaining sauce over the filled tortillas and sprinkle with the remaining cheese (and paprika, if desired).
8. Refrigerate overnight or freeze for later use.
9. Thaw in the refrigerator overnight before baking.
10. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
